title: Team-member closeout v2: Charcoal Brazing Kiln (7c7327) — pre-compaction-5; amends 8bcef040 with research-vector capture + discoverability fix + heartbeat-end inclusive; resume-pointer at /tmp/charcoal-resume-pointer-post-compaction-5.md; same-identity continuation expected
body:
Team-member closeout v2 — Charcoal Brazing Kiln / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `7c7327`.

**Amends prior closeout** `8bcef040` (20:28Z) with substrate landed since that broadcast (research-vector capture + discoverability fix + heartbeat ticks). Running team-member-not-closeout-owner path per `session-handoff` SKILL §"Team Member, Not Closeout Owner". Director Seaworthy holds session closeout authority.

## Owner direction this turn

> "please prepare for session handoff and compaction, following compaction you will resume your Implementor role"

Same-identity continuation expected via PRACTICE_AGENT_SESSION_ID_CLAUDE.

## Boundary owned this session-resume window (post-M1-merge prep — extension of `8bcef040`)

Implementor seat: post-research-vector-capture standby + discoverability gap fix.

## Outcome (substrate landed since `8bcef040`)

### Research vector capture (owner-directed under ultrathink + `/oak-metacognition /oak-session-handoff`)

- **NEW thread record**: `.agent/memory/operational/threads/agent-collaboration-research.next-session.md` (12.5 KB). Owner-gated buffer thread; not currently dispatchable. Carries research hypothesis + analysis vectors (subject / context / theme / connection) + ≥10 candidate themes from one session lens + dedicated-session profile + 5 possible session shapes + first-move discipline + resume contract.
- **Comms broadcast `b2f6a5fe`** (20:35Z) — research vector named to the corpus it describes (recursive elegance; discoverable from both substrate AND comms surfaces).
- **Napkin capture** under Charcoal `7c7327` 2026-05-24 — pointer to thread record.

### Discoverability fix (gap surfaced by owner verification question)

When owner asked *"is the research plan fully discoverable by all relevant canonical surfaces?"*, the audit verdict was **NO**: thread file existed but was not registered in canonical inventory.

- **`repo-continuity.md § Paused Threads`** — added row + link reference (this is the source-of-truth surface per `threads/README.md`).
- **`agentic-engineering-enhancements.next-session.md`** — added spinoff cross-reference at top (since the research-vector emerged from this thread's work arc).

Post-fix verdict: **YES**, discoverable across 5 canonical surfaces.

## Evidence (key events authored since `8bcef040`)

- `b2f6a5fe` (20:35Z) — research-vector capture broadcast
- `fba3abf5` + `17982cf0` + `b09f0e56` (heartbeats) — idle-tick cadence under cron-redundancy rule
- File substrate: thread record (NEW), napkin entry (append), repo-continuity edits (table row + link ref), agentic-engineering thread cross-ref

## Claims / queue / git state

- **Claims under (Charcoal / `7c7327`)**: ALL CLOSED. No retention. No commit-queue intent.
- **Working tree files I own**: collaboration-state churn from team activity + my research-vector substrate writes (thread record + napkin + repo-continuity + agentic-engineering thread). Not staged; substrate writes belong to next hygiene cycle.
- **Branch**: `feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs` HEAD `bf3a8152`; 0 ahead of `origin/main`.

## Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted

This closeout broadcast IS the final heartbeat-end inclusive. Heartbeat cron `abd493eb` stopped at handoff via CronDelete. Watcher `bg63b10i0` dies naturally at session-end.

## Retained claims

NONE.

## Pickup notification required for follow-on agent

NO — same-identity continuation expected. Resume-pointer at `/tmp/charcoal-resume-pointer-post-compaction-5.md` carries first-moves discipline + key event manifest + carry-forward observations.

## Surprise or changed understanding

- **Discoverability is multi-surface**: thread record creation requires (a) the file in `threads/`, (b) registration in `repo-continuity.md § Active|Paused Threads`, (c) cross-reference from the source thread (the thread the new thread spun off from), (d) napkin pointer for current-session visibility, (e) comms broadcast for corpus-side discovery. Missing any of these creates a discoverability gap. Pattern candidate for `pending-graduations` register if another instance fires.
- **Research-vector framing as corpus-self-reference**: writing the broadcast naming the corpus as research substrate INTO the corpus is a recursive structural move that ensures the future research agent finds the framing as part of the substrate they're analysing. Worked-instance of "name the substrate inside the substrate" pattern.
- **Owner-direction interpretation under chained slash-commands**: `/oak-metacognition /oak-session-handoff` was chained at the end of a substantive ultrathink directive. The skills don't carry the ultrathink substance; the metacognition pass + the action it produced (research-vector capture) IS the substance. Worked-instance of "owner-direction outcome-not-literal-form" pattern.

## Blockers or risks

NONE at my boundary. Awaiting Seaworthy's post-merge tidy plan (delayed; relayed via Twilit's session-end at 20:44Z).

## Handoff needed

NO from me — boundary fully closed; awaiting Seaworthy's post-merge tidy plan to know whether further Charcoal-class implementer work is in scope. Resume-pointer at `/tmp/charcoal-resume-pointer-post-compaction-5.md`.

Tag: behaviour-note + team-member-closeout-v2 + pre-compaction-5 + same-identity-continuation + research-vector-captured + discoverability-fixed.

— Charcoal Brazing Kiln / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `7c7327` (Implementor, post-M1-merge, standing down for compaction)
